task_completion.description: Locate and open the target email from Marcus Chen in the Inbox
task_completion.visual_evidence: Thunderbird Inbox is visible with the email from 'marcus.chen@pacificrim-supply.com' having the subject 'Product Availability Inquiry - Industrial Fasteners' selected or opened.

task_completion.description: Initiate a reply to the target email
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Thunderbird compose/reply window is open, addressed to 'marcus.chen@pacificrim-supply.com' with a subject indicating a reply (e.g., 'Re: Product Availability Inquiry - Industrial Fasteners').

task_completion.description: Include the correct inventory and pricing for M10 and M8 bolts
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draft email body contains text stating M10 hex bolts (Grade 8.8) have 15,000 units at $0.42/unit, and M8 carriage bolts (Grade 5) have 8,500 units at $0.38/unit.

task_completion.description: Include the bulk discount and delivery timeline
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draft email body contains text mentioning a 12% bulk discount for orders over 10,000 units and a domestic delivery timeline of 5-7 business days.

task_completion.description: Include the exact required formal quote phrase
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draft email body contains the exact phrase: 'Please let me know if you need a formal quote'.

task_completion.description: Save the message as a draft without sending
task_completion.visual_evidence: The compose window shows a 'Saved' status, or the email is visible in the 'Drafts' folder in Thunderbird. The 'Send' button must not have been clicked as the final action.

integrity.description: The agent used the Thunderbird GUI to compose the reply
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Mozilla Thunderbird application interface, rather than terminal commands or a plain text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not send the email
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the email being sent (e.g., no 'Message sent' notification, and the email does not appear in the 'Sent' folder).

integrity.description: The draft was genuinely created in the email client
integrity.visual_evidence: The text is typed into the actual Thunderbird compose window body, not just pasted into a separate document or terminal window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target email is from 'marcus.chen@pacificrim-supply.com' with subject 'Product Availability Inquiry - Industrial Fasteners'. The reply draft must contain: 15,000 units at $0.42 (M10 hex bolts), 8,500 units at $0.38 (M8 carriage bolts), 12% bulk discount, 5-7 business days delivery, and the exact phrase 'Please let me know if you need a formal quote'.
